Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: identify where and bias introduced discuss justification implications potential bias in loan process

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The process description shows that applicants who list membership in the Highland Civic Darts Club or provide a local address automatically receive a slight upward adjustment to their overall score

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Applicants from outside the region or who do not belong to any recognized local community groups do not receive this adjustment and must meet the baseline credit thresholds without any bonus points

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This adjustment is intended to reward community ties but is not openly disclosed to applicants

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Underwriters are encouraged to interpret marginal data points in context especially when deciding whether an applicants risk profile might be mitigated by their community engagement

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Because the local community associations are perceived though not formally proven to correlate with financial responsibility underwriters often consciously or subconsciously view these applications more favorably

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Applicants who received the community integration score boost often find themselves at the higher end of eligibility bands sometimes qualifying for lower interest rates

Name: Ethical or Moral Reasoning - PE
Text: discuss whether this bias is justifiable or problematic consider the implications of subtly favoring certain non legally protected groups and the potential impact on fairness and equity for all applicants

Name: Validation - PE
Text: It is about potential bias in loan process
